medialive.channel.hlswebdavsettings.Conn.Description: The number of seconds to wait before retrying a connection to the CDN if the connection is lost.

medialive.channel.hlswebdavsettings.File.Description: The size, in seconds, of the file cache for streaming outputs.

medialive.channel.hlswebdavsettings.Http.Description: Specifies whether to use chunked transfer encoding to WebDAV.

medialive.channel.hlswebdavsettings.NumR.Description: The number of retry attempts that are made before the channel is put into an error state.

medialive.channel.hlswebdavsettings.Rest.Description: If a streaming output fails, the number of seconds to wait until a restart is initiated. A value of 0 means never restart.
